uf_modl_revolve_docs.AskRevolution:
Refer to `UF_MODL_ask_revolution <../ugopen_doc/uf_modl/global.html#UF_MODL_ask_revolution>`_ for documentation.  


Signature: 
``AskRevolution(featureObjId)``  

:param featureObjId:  Object tag for the revolved feature
:type featureObjId: Tag
:returns: A Tuple

:rtype: A tuple consisting of (numObjects,objects,trimPtr,limits,offsets,regionPoint,regionSpecified,solidCreation,direction) 


    numObjects(`int`):  Number of revolved curves

    objects(`list of Tag`):  Pointer to an array containing the tags of the revolved curves. This array must be freed by calling UF_free.

    trimPtr(`list of ``NXOpen.UF.Modl.SweepTrimObject``  Refer to `UF_MODL_SWEEP_TRIM_object_s <../ugopen_doc/uf_modl/UF_MODL_SWEEP_TRIM_object_s.html>`_ for documentation.`):  Pointer to structure for trimming data. This pointer may be returned as None, if trimming objects are not used. Use function UF_MODL_SWEEP_free_trim_data to free the trimming data

    limits(`list of str`):  Limits of revolution. Each element of this array must be freed by calling UF_free.

    offsets(`list of str`):  Offsets for open strings. Each element of this array must be freed by calling UF_free.

    regionPoint(`list of float`):  Point on region desired.

    regionSpecified(`bool`):  True or False for region desired.

    solidCreation(`bool`):  TRUE = a solid body.

    direction(`list of float`):  Revolution direction
License requirements: None
uf_modl_revolve_docs.AskSweepCurves:
Refer to `UF_MODL_ask_sweep_curves <../ugopen_doc/uf_modl/global.html#UF_MODL_ask_sweep_curves>`_ for documentation.  


Signature: 
``AskSweepCurves(sweepId)``  

:param sweepId:  sweep or extrusion object identifier
:type sweepId: Tag
:returns: A Tuple

:rtype: A tuple consisting of (nProfileCurves,profileCurves,nGuideCurves,guideCurves) 


    nProfileCurves(`int`):  number of profile curves

    profileCurves(`list of Tag`):  An array of profile curves. This is must be freed by calling UF_free.

    nGuideCurves(`int`):  number of guide curves

    guideCurves(`list of Tag`):  An array of guide curves. This must be freed by calling UF_free.
License requirements: None
uf_modl_revolve_docs.AskSweepDirection:
Refer to `UF_MODL_ask_sweep_direction <../ugopen_doc/uf_modl/global.html#UF_MODL_ask_sweep_direction>`_ for documentation.  


Signature: 
``AskSweepDirection(featureId)``  

:param featureId:  The feature ID
:type featureId: Tag
:returns: A Tuple

:rtype: A tuple consisting of (pos,dir) 


    pos(`list of float`):  The axis point for a revolve feature. Not used for an extrude feature. This must be declared as double pos[3].

    dir(`list of float`):  The axis direction for a revolve feature. For an extrude feature the extruded direction. This must be declared as double dir[3].
License requirements: None
uf_modl_revolve_docs.AskSweepParms:
Refer to `UF_MODL_ask_sweep_parms <../ugopen_doc/uf_modl/global.html#UF_MODL_ask_sweep_parms>`_ for documentation.  


Signature: 
``AskSweepParms(featureObjId, edit)``  

:param featureObjId:  A feature object identifier
:type featureObjId: Tag
:param edit:  This is an unused flag. It was used to determine whether to return the right-hand side or both sides of an expression. Currently, both sides of an expression are returned.
:type edit: int
:returns: A Tuple

:rtype: A tuple consisting of (taperAngle,limit1,limit2) 


    taperAngle(`str`):  Taper angle. This must be freed by calling UF_free.

    limit1(`str`):  Start angle (degrees) for revolved features or start offset distance for extruded features. This must be freed by calling UF_free.

    limit2(`str`):  End angle (degrees) for revolved features or end offset distance for extruded features. This must be freed by calling UF_free.
License requirements: None
uf_modl_revolve_docs.CreateRevolution:
Refer to `UF_MODL_create_revolution <../ugopen_doc/uf_modl/global.html#UF_MODL_create_revolution>`_ for documentation.  


Signature: 
``CreateRevolution(objects, objectArg, trimData, limit, offsets, regionPoint, regionSpecified, solidCreation, axisPoint, direction, sign)``  

:param objects:  Array of objects or one section builder object tag but not both, to be revolved
:type objects: list of Tag
:param objectArg:  Count of objects
:type objectArg: int
:param trimData:  Pointer to structure for trimming data
:type trimData: ``NXOpen.UF.Modl.SweepTrimObject``  Refer to `UF_MODL_SWEEP_TRIM_object_s <../ugopen_doc/uf_modl/UF_MODL_SWEEP_TRIM_object_s.html>`_ for documentation.
:param limit:  Limit of revolution.
:type limit: list of str
:param offsets:  Offsets for open strings
:type offsets: list of str
:param regionPoint:  Point on region of object
:type regionPoint: list of float
:param regionSpecified:  True or False for region desired
:type regionSpecified: bool
:param solidCreation:  If the body_type preference set by UF_MODL_set_body_type_pref is UF_MODL_SOLID_BODY, and solid_creation is set to TRUE, then UF_MODL_create_revolution creates solid bodies if the input string is closed. Otherwise, sheet bodies are the result.
:type solidCreation: bool
:param axisPoint:  Point of origin for axis direction vector
:type axisPoint: list of float
:param direction:  Revolution axis direction vector.
:type direction: list of float
:param sign:  The sign of the operation to be performed. UF_NoneSIGN = create new target solid UF_POSITIVE = add to target solid UF_NEGATIVE = subtract from target solid UF_UNSIGNED = intersect with target solid
:type sign: ``NXOpen.UF.Modl.FeatureSigns``  Refer to `UF_FEATURE_SIGNS <../ugopen_doc/uf_modl/types.html#UF_FEATURE_SIGNS>`_ for documentation.
:returns: A Tuple

:rtype: A tuple consisting of (features,numberOfFeatures) 


    features(`list of Tag`):  Array of revolved feature tags. This must be freed by calling UF_free.

    numberOfFeatures(`int`):  Number of features returned
License requirements: SOLIDS MODELING

uf_modl_revolve_docs.CreateRevolutionDir:
Refer to `UF_MODL_create_revolution_dir <../ugopen_doc/uf_modl/global.html#UF_MODL_create_revolution_dir>`_ for documentation.  


Signature: 
``CreateRevolutionDir(objects, objectArg, trimData, limit, offsets, regionPoint, regionSpecified, solidCreation, datumTag, sign)``  

:param objects:  Array of objects or one section builder object tag but not both, to be revolved
:type objects: list of Tag
:param objectArg:  Count of objects
:type objectArg: int
:param trimData:  Pointer to structure for trimming data
:type trimData: ``NXOpen.UF.Modl.SweepTrimObject``  Refer to `UF_MODL_SWEEP_TRIM_object_s <../ugopen_doc/uf_modl/UF_MODL_SWEEP_TRIM_object_s.html>`_ for documentation.
:param limit:  Limit of the revolution.
:type limit: list of str
:param offsets:  Offsets for open strings
:type offsets: list of str
:param regionPoint:  Point on region of object
:type regionPoint: list of float
:param regionSpecified:  True or False for region desired
:type regionSpecified: bool
:param solidCreation:  If the body_type preference set by UF_MODL_set_body_type_pref is UF_MODL_SOLID_BODY, and solid_creation is set to TRUE, then UF_MODL_create_revolution creates solid bodies if the input string is closed. Otherwise, sheet bodies are the result.
:type solidCreation: bool
:param datumTag:  Object identifier of the datum which is to be used to determine the direction of the revolve.
:type datumTag: Tag
:param sign:  The sign of the operation to be performed. UF_NoneSIGN = create new target solid UF_POSITIVE = add to target solid UF_NEGATIVE = subtract from target solid UF_UNSIGNED = intersect with target solid
:type sign: ``NXOpen.UF.Modl.FeatureSigns``  Refer to `UF_FEATURE_SIGNS <../ugopen_doc/uf_modl/types.html#UF_FEATURE_SIGNS>`_ for documentation.
:returns: A Tuple

:rtype: A tuple consisting of (features,numberOfFeatures) 


    features(`list of Tag`):  Array of revolved feature tags. This must be freed by calling UF_free.

    numberOfFeatures(`int`):  Number of features returned
